title: OT Cybersecurity Training and Awareness Compliance
exclusions: Excludes general IT awareness training; OTCC requires OT-specific cyber awareness for personnel with OT access. Excludes external contractors handled under UC-22.51.23 / UC-22.51.24.
evidence: Saved search `UC-22.51.25` archived weekly to `audit_evidence` with `otcc_clause="OTCC-1-7-1-1"`. Each row preserves (user_id, employee_id, role, ot_role_class, last_training_completed_at, training_module_id, training_outcome, days_since_training, training_overdue_flag, missing_required_module_flag, phishing_simulation_failed_count). Dashboard `NCA OTCC â€“ OT Training Compliance` shows training matrix per role and 13-month trend.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Reconciles training records (LMS: KnowBe4, SANS, NINJIO, OpsCloud, internal LMS) against the OT role-to-training matrix to validate every OT-touching role has completed required OT-specific cyber awareness within the cadence. Phishing simulation results integrated. This satisfies the training control in full.
compliance.controlObjective: Proves every OT-touching role has completed required OT cyber awareness training within the policy cadence and has been phishing-tested.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search `UC-22.51.25` archived to `audit_evidence` plus the `NCA OTCC â€“ OT Training Compliance` dashboard.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Add a test OT operator `OTCC-TEST-OP-001` to HRIS with `ot_role_class=hmi_operator`. Confirm that within 30 days they appear flagged for the `OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A`. UC-22.51.25 MUST flag with `training_overdue_flag=true`.
controlTest.negativeScenario: An OT operator with the required modules completed within the cadence MUST NOT be flagged.

dataSources: LMS feeds: KnowBe4 (`knowbe4:training:completion`), SANS (`sans:training:completion`), NINJIO, OpsCloud, internal LMS (`lms:training:completion`). HRIS for role data (`workday:employee`, `successfactors:employee`). Phishing-simulation results (`knowbe4:phishing:click`). Lookups: `ot_training_matrix.csv`.
app: Splunk Add-on for KnowBe4 (Splunkbase 4810) or LMS-specific TA, Splunk Add-on for Workday (Splunkbase 4747) or HRIS TA, Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263).
spl:
| inputlookup ot_employee_register.csv
| where ot_access_flag="true" AND employment_state="active"
| lookup ot_training_matrix.csv ot_role_class OUTPUT required_modules (mv) training_cadence_days
| eval required_modules = split(required_modules, "|")
| mvexpand required_modules
| rename required_modules AS required_module_id
| join user_id required_module_id type=left [search index=lms (sourcetype IN ("knowbe4:training:completion","sans:training:completion","lms:training:completion")) earliest=-13mon outcome="complete" | rename module_id AS required_module_id | dedup user_id required_module_id sortby - _time | rename _time AS last_training_completed_at]
| eval days_since_training = round((now() - last_training_completed_at)/86400)
| eval missing_required_module_flag = if(isnull(last_training_completed_at), "true", "false")
| eval training_overdue_flag = if(missing_required_module_flag="false" AND days_since_training > training_cadence_days, "true", "false")
| join user_id type=left [search index=lms sourcetype="knowbe4:phishing:click" earliest=-12mon | stats count AS phishing_simulation_failed_count BY user_id]
| eval phishing_simulation_failed_count = coalesce(phishing_simulation_failed_count, 0)
| where missing_required_module_flag="true" OR training_overdue_flag="true" OR phishing_simulation_failed_count >= 3
| table user_id employee_id role ot_role_class required_module_id last_training_completed_at days_since_training training_cadence_days phishing_simulation_failed_count missing_required_module_flag training_overdue_flag
| sort - missing_required_module_flag training_overdue_flag phishing_simulation_failed_count
description: Reconciles each OT-touching employee against the required-training matrix and phishing-simulation outcomes; flags missing modules, overdue refreshers, and serial phishing-test failures.
value: Human factors are the leading initial-access vector even in OT environments. NCA OTCC inspectors will request training-completion evidence per role; producing it manually is days of work; this UC produces it continuously.
implementation: (1) Build `ot_training_matrix.csv` mapping `ot_role_class` to required modules and cadence. (2) Build `ot_employee_register.csv` from HRIS with `ot_access_flag`. (3) Onboard LMS feeds and phishing-simulation feeds. (4) Schedule UC-22.51.25 weekly.
visualization: (Panel 1) Single-value 'Missing required training', 'Overdue training', 'Phishing failures 12mo'. (Panel 2) Training compliance matrix per ot_role_class. (Panel 3) Sortable table of flagged employees. (Panel 4) 13-month trend.

references.title: NCA OTCC â€” control list portal
NIST SP 800-50r1 â€” Building an Information Technology Security Awareness and Training Program

knownFalsePositives:
1. **New hire onboarding window** â€” a new hire has 60 days from hire-date to complete initial training. Suppression: only flag missing-required-module if hire-date is older than 60 days.

2. **Long absence** (medical, parental leave) â€” employee on extended leave should not be expected to complete training. Suppression: `leave_register.csv`.

3. **Phishing failure during sanctioned phishing test** â€” an employee may legitimately fail a particularly hard test; failure alone is not a violation. The 3-failures-in-12-months threshold captures pattern not single incidents.

**Suppression mechanism**: KV Store `otcc_22_51_25_exceptions`.
equipmentModels: KnowBe4 Security Awareness Training (course completion + phishing-simulation events)
Splunk Add-on for KnowBe4 (Splunkbase 4810) or LMS-specific TA
Splunk Add-on for Workday (Splunkbase 4747) or HRIS-specific TA
Splunk Enterprise Security 7.x (Splunkbase 263, audit_evidence summary index with training markers)
Workday HCM / SuccessFactors LMS (HRIS feed for OT-tagged personnel)
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- Splunk Enterprise â‰Ą9.2 or Splunk Cloud.
- LMS (KnowBe4, SANS, NINJIO, OpsCloud, internal) onboarded.
- HRIS feed (Workday, SAP SuccessFactors, BambooHR).
- `index=lms`, `index=hr`.
- Lookups:
  - `ot_training_matrix.csv` â€” owned by Head of OT Security with HR L&D. Columns: `ot_role_class`, `required_modules` (pipe-separated mvfield), `training_cadence_days`. Examples:

    ```csv
    ot_role_class,required_modules,training_cadence_days
    hmi_operator,"OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A|Phishing_OT_Module_B",365
    plc_engineer,"OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A|OT_Change_Management_Module_C|PLC_Programming_Security_Module_E",365
    sis_engineer,"OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A|SIS_Cyber_Safety_Module_D",365
    network_engineer_ot,"OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A|OT_Network_Security_Module_F",365
    ot_cyber_analyst,"OT_Cyber_Awareness_Module_A|OT_IR_Module_G|MITRE_ATTACK_ICS_Module_H",180
    ```

  - `ot_employee_register.csv` â€” owned by HR. Refreshed daily. Includes `ot_access_flag`.
  - KV Store `otcc_22_51_25_exceptions`.

## Step 1 â€” Configure data collection

KnowBe4 (typical pattern):

```ini
[knowbe4://training_completions]
endpoint = https://api.knowbe4.com/v1/training/enrollments
record_type = json
interval = 21600
index = lms
sourcetype = knowbe4:training:completion
```

Workday HRIS via TA:

```ini
[workday://employees]
interval = 86400
index = hr
sourcetype = workday:employee
```

Generate `ot_employee_register.csv` daily via a saved search that joins HRIS with the OT access policy (e.g. employees in OT cost centres, or with badge access to OT zones from UC-22.51.18).

## Step 2 â€” Create the search and alert

Flags per SPL.

**Schedule**:

```ini
[UC-22.51.25: OT Cybersecurity Training and Awareness Compliance]
cron_schedule = 0 8 * * 1
dispatch.earliest_time = -1d@d
dispatch.latest_time = now
actions = summary_index, email
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.51.25,reg=NCA_OTCC,clause=OTCC-1-7-1-1
action.email.to = ot-cyber-programme@example.com,hr-ld@example.com
alert.severity = 2
```

## Step 3 â€” Validate deployment

**(a)** Employee register accuracy: spot-check 20 employees.

**(b)** Training matrix coverage: every ot_role_class present.

**(c)** Positive control per `controlTest.positiveScenario`.

**(d)** Negative control per `controlTest.negativeScenario`.

## Step 4 â€” Operationalize

**Dashboard**: `NCA OTCC â€“ OT Training Compliance`.

- **Row 1, single values**: 'Missing required training', 'Overdue training', 'Phishing failures 12mo'.
- **Row 2, matrix**: ot_role_class Ă— module compliance percentage.
- **Row 3, sortable table** with drill-through to LMS.
- **Row 4, 13-month trend**.

**Runbook**: monthly L&D campaign for overdue employees. Repeat phishing-failure pattern: trigger additional targeted training and notify line manager.

## Step 5 â€” Troubleshooting

**Module-ID mismatch** between LMS and training matrix â€” maintain `training_module_alias.csv`.

**OT-specific failure modes**:

- **Contractor OT engineers**: covered under UC-22.51.23 third-party assurance, not this UC.
- **Air-gapped plant operators** without LMS access: instructor-led training; capture via manual roster in `index=audit_evidence` source `lms:training:completion` with a special LMS instance ID.
- **Multilingual workforce**: ensure modules are available in Arabic and English for KSA-based personnel.
grandmaExplanation: We make sure every plant worker has done their cyber-safety classes and that they haven't fallen for fake phishing emails too many times. If anyone is behind on their classes, we ask them to catch up.
